revision.text:
[[ja:猪鼻湖神社]] {{Expand Japanese|猪鼻湖神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inohanako Shrine | native_name = 猪鼻湖神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inohanako Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Inohanako Shrine'''|猪鼻湖神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11642130|ltq=Q11642130|qid=Q11642130|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 3 ** P155: {{ill|Hamana Sōsha-shinmeigū|lt=Hamana Sōsha-shinmeigū|ja|濱名惣社神明宮|qid=Q119929616|1=Hamana Sōsha-shinmeigū}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039582|ltq=Q135039582|qid=Q135039582|1=Oomuwano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|lt=Tōtōmi Province|ckb|پارێزگای تۆتۆمی|cs|Tótómi (provincie)|de|Provinz Tōtōmi|en|Tōtōmi Province|eo|Provinco Tōtōmi|es|Provincia de Tōtōmi|fa|ولایت توتومی|fr|Province de Tōtōmi|gl|Provincia de Tōtōmi|id|Provinsi Tōtōmi|it|Tōtōmi|ja|遠江国|ko|도토미국|lt|Tōtōmio žemė|nl|Tōtōmi (provincie)|pt|Província de Tōtōmi|ru|Тотоми (провинция)|simple|Tōtōmi Province|sk|Tótómi|sr|Провинција Тотоми|tr|Tōtōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Тотомі|zh_min_nan|Tôtômi-kok|zh_yue|遠江國|zh|遠江國|qid=Q1048864|1=Tōtōmi Province}} * {{ill|Q1042370|ltq=Q1042370|qid=Q1042370|1=Hamana District, Shizuoka}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181489 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039581|ltq=Q135039581|qid=Q135039581|1=Wihanano Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県浜松市浜名区三ヶ日町下尾奈', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:猪鼻湖神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928475}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Inohanako Shrine |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=浜松市}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Hamamatsu|Q185125|qid=Q185125|1=Hamamatsu}}{{ill|lt=Hamana Ward|Q117077169|qid=Q117077169|1=Hamana-ku, Hamamatsu}} Mikkabi-chō Shimoona 2258 |位置 = {{coord|34|46|15|N|137|32|53.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi|Q363406|qid=Q363406|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Takemikazuchi}}, {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q1147503|qid=Q1147503|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Johann Beckenbach}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 9 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Inohanako
Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|46|15|N|137|32|53.7|E}}|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=280|coord={{coord|34|46|15|N|137|32|53.7|E}}}} }} '''Inohanako Shrine''' (いのはなこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Mikkabi-chō Shimoona, {{ill|lt=Hamana Ward|Q117077169|qid=Q117077169|1=Hamana-ku, Hamamatsu}}, {{ill|lt=Hamamatsu|Q185125|qid=Q185125|1=Hamamatsu}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4415075 猪鼻湖神社] - 静岡県神社庁. === Overview === It is enshrined on the east side of the connection point of Lake Inohana, a branch lake northwest of {{ill|lt=Lake Hamana|Q1150952|qid=Q1150952|1=Lake Hamana}} (at the western tip of the Ōsaki Peninsula). Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine also recorded as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}[http://engishiki.org/toutoumi/bun/to120103-01.html 猪鼻湖神社] - 延喜式神社の調査[https://genbu.net/data/toutoumi/inohanako_title.htm 猪鼻湖神社] - 玄松子. In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi|Q363406|qid=Q363406|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Takemikazuchi}} * {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q1147503|qid=Q1147503|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Johann Beckenbach}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4415075 猪鼻湖神社] - 静岡県神社庁 == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inohanako Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inohanako Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inohanako Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:浜名区の建築物]] [[Category:History of Hamana Ward]] [[Category:遠江国の式内社]]
